answers.contents:
i now confused if i should just resign and fully commit myself to another round of job seeking (where i expect to extend target countries)

---

My take is never resign from your company particularly in 2023 China. I've applied US jobs from China before and honestly the major challenge is your work authorization (I can legally work in the US so I got a decent job pretty effortlessly).


... or stay still and bide my time for economic recovery so that getting an oversea job might be easier?

---

Never stay still even in developed world, and do not expect any 'economic recovery' in China in foreseeable future. If I were you I would try some opportunities in EU for some blue collar jobs.
Instead of picking up textbook knowledge, I would study immigration policy for target countries thoroughly and get in border first.
